_comment: Canonical curated model catalog (Block BC / T759) — the single source of truth for the LLM-instance model picker fallback (Block BB / T577) AND the public catalog API published at turing.viglet.org (T760). Keyed by provider plugin type (lower-case, as resolved by TurGenAiLlmProviderFactory). The combobox is editable, so an id not listed here can still be typed. Each entry: id (required) + label (required) + kind (CHAT|EMBEDDING|RERANK|IMAGE|TRANSCRIPTION|SPEECH|VIDEO|MODERATION; the T750 taxonomy) + optional contextWindow / embeddingDimensions / capabilities / deprecated. Omit a field rather than guess — wrong metadata poisons the reference (STRATEGY X.5). Contract: models-catalog.schema.json. Emit the public artifact with scripts/emit-model-catalog.mjs. Keep current on redeploy.
